notes: Declarative contract for tools the portfolio Intent Router is allowed to propose.
Edit this file (or point INTENT_MANIFEST_URL at a hosted manifest / MCP /tools/list) — do NOT add per-tool keywords or regex in the router or the widget.
Risk levels: READ_ONLY (always auto-confirmed), WRITE (low-risk, may auto-execute when authenticated), RISKY_WRITE (always requires user confirmation).
requiredRole: null = public visitor, 'USER' = signed in, 'ADMIN' = site owner.

tools.name: admin.search_content
tools.description: Search portfolio content (blogs, projects, life-blog entries, experience entries) by keyword. Returns matching items with IDs, titles, and snippets.

tools.name: admin.list_content
tools.description: List the most recent portfolio content items of a given type. Use this when the user asks to see/show their recent blogs, projects, life-blog entries, or experience entries.

tools.name: admin.publish_content
tools.description: Publish a portfolio content item by its exact sourceId. Triggers content versioning, Kafka outbox event, RAG re-indexing, OpenSearch re-indexing, and the notification pipeline. Owner-only and irreversible at this step.

sourceId.description: Exact opaque resource ID. Must be resolved by a prior search/list call — NEVER invented by the classifier.

tools.name: admin.unpublish_content
tools.description: Unpublish a previously-published content item by its exact sourceId. Owner-only.

tools.name: notification.list_failed_deliveries
tools.description: List failed or pending notification delivery attempts (email or web). Owner-only diagnostics.

tools.name: notification.send_test_notification
tools.description: Send a TEST notification (email or web) to a recipient. Used to validate the notification pipeline. Owner-only.

tools.name: contact.email_owner
tools.description: PUBLIC: send a message from a visitor to the site owner via the contact form. Use this when an unauthenticated user wants to reach out, leave feedback, ask a question, or send their email. NEVER use this for notification testing or admin operations. NEVER use this when the user only wants to SUBSCRIBE / receive updates — for that, use `subscription.create`.

message.description: The body of the message the visitor wants to send to the owner.

tools.name: subscription.create
tools.description: PUBLIC: subscribe a visitor's email to one or more site update topics (newsletter-style). Use this whenever the user says they want to SUBSCRIBE, get updates, follow the site, join the newsletter / mailing list, or be notified about new content (English: 'subscribe', 'subscribe for updates', 'sign me up', 'get updates'; Chinese: '订阅', '订阅更新', '关注更新'). Only an email is required — do NOT ask for a name or a message. This is NOT the same as `contact.email_owner` (which sends a one-off message to the site owner) and NOT the same as `notification.send_test_notification` (admin-only test).

topics.description: Topic categories to subscribe to. Valid values: ARTICLE_UPDATES (new blog/life-blog articles), FEATURE_UPDATES (new site features/projects), JOB_UPDATES (job/opportunity updates). When the user says 'all updates' / 'everything' / '所有更新' / '全部', include all three. When unspecified, default to ["ARTICLE_UPDATES", "FEATURE_UPDATES"].

tools.name: subscription.update
tools.description: PUBLIC: update an existing subscriber's notification preferences (which topics they receive, or whether they're enabled). Use when the user says they want to change / update / adjust their subscription topics or preferences. NOT for first-time signup (use `subscription.create`) and NOT for unsubscribe (use `subscription.unsubscribe`).

topics.description: New topic set to replace the existing preferences.

enabled.description: Pause/resume the subscription without deleting it.

tools.name: subscription.unsubscribe
tools.description: PUBLIC: unsubscribe a visitor's email from site updates. Use when the user says 'unsubscribe', 'stop emails', 'remove me', '退订', '取消订阅'. Only an email is required (a one-click token may optionally be passed through if the user provides one).

token.description: Optional one-click unsubscribe token from an email footer; pass through verbatim if supplied.

tools.name: analytics.get_visitor_summary
tools.description: OWNER: Get aggregate site visitor metrics — total events, page views, clicks, top countries, top devices. Use for questions like '最近的访客', 'recent visitors', 'site traffic', 'how many people visited', '访客统计', '流量', '访问量'. The result is aggregate-only (no individual visitor data). Default window is 7 days.

days.description: Number of days to look back. Minimum 7 for privacy. Default 7. Use 30 for 'last month', 7 for 'recent' / 'last week'.

tools.name: analytics.get_top_pages
tools.description: OWNER: Get top pages by aggregate visit count. Use when the user asks about 'top pages', 'most visited pages', 'popular content', '热门页面', '访问最多的页面'.

days.description: Number of days to look back. Minimum 7. Default 7.
